summary: The provided literature discusses the underlying pathology of liver diseases but makes no reference to technical elements of hepatic arterial embolization—such as embolic material type or procedural accuracy—that could impact post-procedure outcomes. Thus, based solely on this body of work, it cannot be concluded that technical factors affect prognosis in patients with unresectable HCC undergoing embolotherapy.
